channel.title: +2 Dominance on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +2 Dominance on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Arya consolidation
item.description: Spread within India From baudhAyana and manu, it is clear that kuru-pAnchAla realm was where major brAhmaNa vedic consolidation happened. Gradually, this culture and its carriers (mainly in the form of brAhmaNa-s) spread elsewhere in India and beyond. {GA_17} baudhAyana-dharma-sUtra implies that vaidika karma-s can only be conducted in the “madhya-desha”, not even in kalinga, vanga, AraTTa, gAndhAra etc.. - going where expiation is required [TW]. Yet, we observe baudhAyana-s and vaidika-s in kerala and TN.
